title: Legacy per-exercise drill-in progression chart
reason: CUT-2 Stage 3b: invisible dead weight (hidden in Analysis by GRAPH-2 CSS; standalone tab gone; universal #waGraph is the only trend chart). Removed to shrink main.ts; kept here in case the per-set scatter / scaled-effort line is wanted back.
wiredInto: 5 call sites: renderExerciseProgressChart(selectedExercise) in the drill-in render flows
3 click listeners in init (exerciseProgressCenter / exPersetBest / exProgCompact)
els.exerciseProgress.hidden = true in the non-drill-in render flow
saveCurrentCombine() wrote its 'already exists' message to els.exerciseProgressNote — on removal that was switched to window.alert()
restoreSteps: Re-add the exerciseSvg handle + exPersetBestOnly state + the 5 els entries to main.ts.
Re-add the 3 control listeners in init and the 5 call sites.
Re-add `els.exerciseProgress.hidden = true;` in the non-drill-in render flow.
Restore the <div id="exerciseProgress"> DOM block in index.html (see .code.ts).
Revert saveCurrentCombine() back to writing els.exerciseProgressNote (optional — alert is fine).
npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build.
